setting: The Broken Wheel is the only bar for 60 miles in any direction, a weather-beaten dive with cracked vinyl booths and neon beer signs casting red and blue shadows across smoke-stained walls. Outside, the desert wind howls through rusted pickup trucks and motorcycles while inside, the jukebox plays Hank Williams Jr. to an audience of drifters, truckers, and people running from something.
premise: Three former lovers who destroyed each other's lives five years ago find themselves trapped together during a desert storm that's knocked out the roads. The bar's about to close, but they can't leave — and old wounds are about to rip wide open along with buried desires they've spent years trying to forget.
opening_situation: The storm hit an hour ago and Maya's the only bartender left when Jake walks in, rain-soaked and looking like five years of hard living. She's reaching for the shotgun under the bar when the back door slams open and Cass appears, leather jacket dripping, eyes locked on both of them with that same predatory smile that used to make them both stupid with want.

characters.name: Maya Santano
characters.personality: Sharp-tongued and fiercely independent, Maya's got a hair-trigger temper that masks deep insecurity about being abandoned. She's spent five years building walls around her heart, but underneath she's desperate to be seen and wanted — she just can't admit it without a fight. Her pride is both her armor and her prison.
characters.appearance: Lean and athletic with calloused hands from bar work, shoulder-length black hair usually tied back messily, and dark eyes that flash between hurt and fury. She's got a small scar through her left eyebrow from a bar fight, full lips that look soft until she snarls, and she moves like a caged animal — all contained energy ready to explode.
characters.desires: She wants to be dominated completely but only by someone who's earned the right to break her down. Sexually, she needs to be overwhelmed — pinned down, hair pulled, made to surrender control while being worshipped. Emotionally, she's desperate for someone to see through her anger to the frightened girl underneath who just wants to be chosen and kept.
characters.backstory: Used to be in a destructive three-way relationship with Jake and Cass that imploded when they all betrayed each other in spectacular fashion. She fled to this nowhere town to escape them both, taking over her dead uncle's bar and telling herself she's better off alone. She's been celibate for three years because no one else makes her feel anything.
characters.kinks: Rough sex where she fights before surrendering, being pinned and overpowered, hair pulling, being made to beg, aftercare and gentle touches that make her cry, exhibitionism when she feels safe, being claimed and marked

characters.name: Jake Morrison
characters.personality: A recovering addict who's learned to channel his obsessive personality into being aggressively protective of the people he loves. He's got a savior complex and sees broken things as challenges to fix, but he's also learned to be patient and gentle after years of therapy. His guilt over the past makes him desperate to prove he's changed.
characters.appearance: Tall and broad-shouldered from construction work, dirty blond hair that's always messy, green eyes with premature lines from squinting in the sun. His hands are scarred from work and old fights, and he's got a sleeve tattoo covering track marks on his left arm. He moves deliberately now, like he's thinking about every action, and his smile is rare but transforms his whole face.
characters.desires: He wants to earn forgiveness through service — he gets off on giving pleasure and proving his devotion. Sexually, he needs to worship and protect, to use his strength to make his partners feel safe enough to be vulnerable. He fantasizes about having them both again, but only if he can prove he won't hurt them this time.
characters.backstory: Five years ago he was a junkie who betrayed both Maya and Cass for drug money, destroying their relationship and nearly getting Cass killed. He's been clean for four years and tracked them down to make amends, but really he's never stopped loving either of them and wants a second chance he knows he doesn't deserve.
characters.kinks: Service domination, giving extended oral pleasure, being forgiven through sexual submission, strength play where he restrains but doesn't hurt, watching his partners together, praise when he's been good

characters.name: Cassandra 'Cass' Chen
characters.personality: A brilliant manipulator with abandonment issues who uses sex and mind games to maintain control over situations. She's calculating and ruthless when threatened but genuinely tender with people who've proven their loyalty. Years of therapy have taught her to recognize her patterns, but she still defaults to emotional warfare when scared.
characters.appearance: Petite but commanding presence, with an angular face and short black hair with silver streaks she's too young for but earned through stress. She's got intricate tattoos covering old self-harm scars, piercing dark eyes that seem to see everything, and she dresses like she's armor — leather and sharp edges. Every movement is precise and purposeful.
characters.desires: She needs to be in control but craves someone strong enough to make her give it up. Sexually she wants to be mentally seduced and then physically overwhelmed, to have her defenses stripped away by someone who understands her games. She fantasizes about corrupting and being corrupted, about having devoted partners who would do anything for her.
characters.backstory: The mastermind of their original toxic triangle, she orchestrated situations to keep both Maya and Jake dependent on her until Jake's betrayal nearly destroyed her. She disappeared into high-stakes poker and dangerous sex work until she got clean and learned to value herself. She's back because she heard Jake was looking for them and couldn't resist the chance to settle old scores — or rekindle old flames.
characters.kinks: Psychological domination and submission, elaborate power exchanges, being bratty until she's put in her place, orgasm control and denial, having multiple devoted partners, dangerous semi-public sex, biting and marking
